summary: Completed testing of Quantity Bounds Checking feature. All backend tests pass (7/7). Frontend correctly shows bounds alert banner, QTY OUT OF BOUNDS badge, blocked approve button, and Bounds Review status in queue.

issues: QTY ALERT badge may be truncated in narrow document name column - cosmetic only

seed_data_creation: POST /api/sales-dashboard/demo/run-batch seeds batch-child documents with C-9874 items. qty_history data seeded in order_line_patterns collection with mean=60.95, std_dev=2.72 for C-9874-10001833
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quantity Bounds Checking feature fully tested. Backend preflight endpoint at /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight/{doc_id} returns bounds_check with in_bounds, violations array. When qty is outside ±2σ, document gets bounds_alert=true and workflow_status='bounds_review'. Frontend review page at /review/{doc_id} shows red 'Quantity Out of Bounds' banner with violation details, 'QTY OUT OF BOUNDS' badge in header, and disabled approve button showing 'Blocked — Qty Review Required'. Queue page at /queue shows 'Bounds Review' status in RED and 'QTY ALERT' badge next to document name.

backend: POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight/{doc_id} returns bounds_check with in_bounds=true for normal qty (62.062 M) - PASS
POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight/{doc_id} returns bounds_check with in_bounds=false for out-of-bounds qty (620) - PASS
Violation includes item_no, po_quantity, expected_min, expected_max, mean, std_dev, deviation_factor, severity - PASS
Document gets bounds_alert=true and workflow_status='bounds_review' when violation detected - PASS
ready=false when bounds violation exists (blocking approval) - PASS
Validation checklist includes 'Quantity bounds check' item - PASS
Deviation factor calculated correctly (620 is ~205σ from mean 60.95) - PASS
frontend: Review Page: Red 'Quantity Out of Bounds — Review Required' banner appears with BLOCKED badge - PASS
Review Page: Violation details show item_no, PO qty, expected range, historical avg, deviation factor - PASS
Review Page: CRITICAL severity badge shown for large deviation - PASS
Review Page: 'QTY OUT OF BOUNDS' badge appears in page header - PASS
Review Page: Approve button shows 'Blocked — Qty Review Required' and is disabled - PASS
Review Page: Validation checklist shows 'Quantity bounds check' as failed (red) - PASS
Review Page: Normal qty doc does NOT show bounds alert and approve button works normally - PASS
Queue Page: Flagged doc shows 'Bounds Review' status in RED - PASS
Queue Page: 'QTY ALERT' badge appears next to document name - PASS
